title: Handler Tests, Live-Protocol Tests, Fuzzing, Race Detection, and Contracts · Runtime Contract: Httptest Request Recorder
summary: Tests call handler functions directly, inspect ResponseRecorder fields incorrectly, omit middleware and cancellation, never use TLS or concurrency, and assert only one status code. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsgo httptest request recorder increment in layered deterministic server test system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use httptest.NewRequestWithContext, NewRecorder, Result, headers, body limits, route values, and table cases while naming recorder limitations.
Handle unparsable query parameters, backend timeouts, bounded bodies, ModifyResponse, ErrorHandler, streaming, Alt-Svc, and sanitized failure evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go server Predict Httptest Request Recorder · Theory Httptest Request Recorder
